_comment: Edit this file to change quotas, targets, or exclusions. No code changes needed.
_note_exclusions: A line is counted as a song only if it has a real file path AND none of its folder segments (split on \ or /) exactly match the names above. Because 'Jingles' is a segment, '3_Made in Belgium\Jingles' is excluded while '3_Made in Belgium\Music' songs are counted. Filler entries (Silence, top horaire, Pub) all have an empty () path and are excluded automatically. We do NOT filter on the word 'silence' in the title: 'CHARLES - silence BEFR.mp3' is a real song.
_note_quotas: target draws a dotted line of the quota's colour on the dashboard. time_window restricts the quota to a time-of-day range; denominator picks what the percentage is measured against: 'window' (songs inside the window) or 'day' (all songs that day).
